steps_completed.task: Add health loading state test: mock getHealth with never-resolving promise, assert 'Checking...' text and orange beacon via toHaveStyle

Add health error state test (non-Error fallback): mock getHealth with mockRejectedValue('string error'), assert 'Connection failed' fallback text
Add healthy beacon style test: verify green beacon with toHaveStyle for background and boxShadow glow when health returns ok
Add markets loading state test: mock listMarkets with never-resolving promise, assert loading state and no Platform Stats
Add platform stats formatCurrency integration test: volumes 500+1500=2000 → '2.0K', liquidity 1000+2000=3000 → '3.0K'
Add CountCard color assertion test: verify active markets count card applies color var(--color-success)
Add empty markets array test: all status counts render as 0, totals render as '0.00'
Add API info section test: verify apiVersion '1.0.0' renders, route groups 'health' and 'markets' displayed with routes
Run full test suite — all 14 tests pass (5 existing + 9 new)
